title: Jamaican Keto Bao Burgers
description: A keto twist on traditional bao burgers, featuring a Jamaican-inspired patty and a crispy fermented bun.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Form the ground beef into 4 equal patties and season with Jamaican jerk seasoning.
Grill the patties for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Meanwhile, toast the fermented bao buns on the grill or in a toaster.
Assemble the burgers by spreading fix on the bottom bun, followed by a cooked patty, cheddar cheese, and bacon.
